title: feat: promote GPT-5.6 models
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Sets GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna pricing to 0.5× provider cost.
- Adds a limited-time Enter dashboard announcement with the promotional rates.
- Updates pricing assertions and effective-price snapshots.
- Validates all three models with live local requests and focused billing tests.

gist.headline: Three moons, half price
gist.blurb: Sol, Terra, and Luna are getting a little extra sunlight. GPT-5.6 now lands at promotional 0.5× provider-cost rates, with the Enter dashboard carrying the good news.
gist.summary: GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna now use limited-time promotional pricing at 0.5× provider cost, with the rates announced in the Enter dashboard and covered by updated billing snapshots and tests.
gist.impact: Developers can use all three GPT-5.6 variants at the new promotional rates, while the dashboard and billing checks keep the displayed and charged prices aligned.
gist.visual_concept: Depict the three GPT-5.6 model variants as three friendly pastel celestial bodies—sun-like Sol, leafy earth-like Terra, and a soft moon-like Luna—hovering over a cozy pricing garden. Polly, wearing tiny astronomer glasses and holding a small price-tag telescope, observes their matching half-price signs beside a warm retro Enter dashboard terminal; include code-plants and flowers to make the promotion feel like a seasonal bloom.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, a cute yellow bee with dark brown stripes, black oval eyes, pink rectangular cheek blushes, a happy smile, light blue rounded wings, and tiny astronomer glasses, using a price-tag telescope to admire three friendly pastel celestial sprites labeled “SOL”, “TERRA”, and “LUNA” above a retro Enter dashboard terminal showing simple pixel text “0.5×”. Lime green (#ecf874) code-plants and flowers bloom around the terminal in a warm cream, mint, lavender, and peach garden; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
